# OrderStatus

The lifecycle stage of an order.

## Values

- **`CANCELLED`**
- **`DELIVERED`**
- **`PAID`**
- **`PENDING`** — Created but not yet paid.
- **`REFUNDED`** — Paid, then fully refunded.
- **`SHIPPED`**
